Previous Service Calculator Calculate total and continuous NHS service
Previous service Career break

Career break

Enter the service dates and aggregated service before the career break. The results move each date forward and reduce aggregated service by the inclusive number of career-break days.

Dates before the career break

Aggregated service before the career break

Career break period

Adjusted service

Career break 0 days Enter a date from and date to
Adjusted Incremental Date — Moved forward by the career-break days
Adjusted CSD 3 Months — Moved forward by the career-break days
Adjusted CSD 12 Months — Moved forward by the career-break days
Adjusted Aggregated Service — Career-break days are deducted from service
